title: Full-Stack Development
content: We build web applications, APIs, and data platforms from the ground up — or step into existing codebases and make them better. Our work ranges from national public-facing platforms to internal tooling for enterprise organisations. We bring engineering rigour and design sensibility to everything we ship.
secondaryContent: We take a collaborative approach, working closely with you from discovery through to deployment. That means honest conversations about scope, regular feedback, and occasionally telling you to do less. We would rather help you ship something lean that gets real traction than build six months of features that might not survive contact with users. The people you brief are the people you hear from throughout.

title: Web Design
content: Both founders bring design into everything they build — one through a background in computational and architectural design, one through a deep interest in usability, interface theory, UX research, and the kind of frontend craft that comes from genuinely caring how things feel to use. That shapes everything we build.
secondaryContent: We design for clarity, accessibility, and character. Whether that means a bold visual identity for a new product, a polished interface for a complex data platform, or 3D interactive elements that make a website genuinely memorable. We treat design as part of the engineering process rather than an afterthought.

title: AI Engineering
content: We design and build AI systems that work in production. Our speciality is multi-agent architectures, retrieval-augmented generation, and NLP pipelines for complex, safety-critical, and regulated domains. We think carefully about human oversight, data governance, and what happens when things go wrong.
secondaryContent: We have shipped production AI systems for national charities, and founders working in education, research and real estate. Every implementation is grounded in real-world constraints. We can take such a system from proof-of-concept to production-ready, anywhere in between or help you integrate AI into an existing product.

title: Technical Discovery
content: Before writing a line of code, we help you understand what you are actually building. We spend time properly understanding your domain, researching the problem, and feeding back as we go. That process often reveals that the right MVP is simpler than the one on the brief. We would rather help you ship something essential and get it in front of real users than spend months building features that might never survive contact with them.
secondaryContent: Everything we produce in discovery belongs to you. Take it anywhere, build it yourself, hand it to another team. We recommend discovery because it clarifies requirements, validates technical and budget feasibility, and ultimately produces better software — and that benefits everyone.
